indicators.name: bed
indicators.rationale: The bed is large and comfortable, providing ample space for rest.

indicators.name: pillows
indicators.rationale: The pillows are soft and supportive, enhancing comfort during sleep.

indicators.name: darkness
indicators.rationale: The room is dark, which is conducive to sleep.

reasoning_summary: The indoor scene is ideally suited for sleep (primary) due to the presence of a large, comfortable bed, soft pillows, and darkness, which are all conducive to restful sleep.
